message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Conceptual Foundations and Measurement",
      "description": "Equip learners with tools to understand the working of Chemistry, develop conceptual foundations, represent phenomena at macroscopic/molecular/symbolic levels, identify patterns, and apply knowledge to real-life situations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Understand nature of matter, properties, measurement, uncertainty in measurement",
        "Apply laws of chemical combination and Dalton's atomic theory",
        "Calculate atomic/molecular masses, mole concept, molar mass, percentage composition",
        "Perform stoichiometry and stoichiometric calculations"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C2",
      "title": "Atomic Structure and Quantum Mechanics",
      "description": "Enable learners to trace the development from sub-atomic particles discovery through Bohr's model to the quantum mechanical model, understanding atomic structure deeply.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify sub-atomic particles and their properties",
        "Analyze historical developments leading to Bohr's Model of Atom",
        "Apply Bohr's Model for Hydrogen atom calculations",
        "Understand the transition towards Quantum Mechanical Model"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Structure of Atom",
      "chapter_name": "Structure of Atom"
    },
    {
      "code": "C3",
      "title": "Periodic Classification and Trends",
      "description": "Enable learners to classify elements, understand the genesis of periodic classification, apply modern periodic law, analyze electronic configurations across blocks (s, p, d, f), and predict trends in properties.",
      "competencies": [
        "Justify need for element classification and explain Genesis of Periodic Classification",
        "Apply Modern Periodic Law to determine the present form of Periodic Table",
        "Nomenclature elements with atomic number > 100",
        "Correlate electronic configuration with position in periodic table (s, p, d, f blocks)",
        "Predict and explain periodic trends in properties"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties",
      "chapter_name": "Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties"
    },
    {
      "code": "C4",
      "title": "Chemical Bonding Theories",
      "description": "Enable learners to apply various bonding theories (Kossel-Lewis, VSEPR, Valence Bond, Molecular Orbital) and hybridization concepts to explain molecular structure and properties.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Kossel-Lewis approach for Ionic/Electrovalent bonds",
        "Analyze bond parameters",
        "Predict molecular geometry using VSEPR Theory",
        "Explain bonding via Valence Bond Theory and Hybridisation concepts",
        "Describe Molecular Orbital Theory and bonding in homonuclear diatomic molecules"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure"
    },
    {
      "code": "C5",
      "title": "Thermodynamics and Spontaneity",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand thermodynamic terms, measure enthalpy changes (calorimetry), analyze spontaneity using Gibbs Energy change, and relate equilibrium concepts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Define thermodynamic terms and applications",
        "Measure ∆U and ∆H via calorimetry"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Thermodynamics",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Thermodynamics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C6",
      "title": "Equilibrium Principles",
      "description": "Enable learners to analyze dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes, apply the Law of Chemical Equilibrium, understand factors affecting equilibria (Le Chatelier's principle), and solve ionic equilibrium problems.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between physical and chemical dynamic equilibrium"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "C7",
      "title": "Redox Reactions and Electrode Processes",
      "description": "Enable learners to identify oxidation-reduction reactions through classical ideas, electron transfer concepts, and oxidation numbers, linking them to electrode processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify oxidation and reduction in classical terms"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C8",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry Fundamentals",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand tetravalence of carbon, shapes and representations of organic compounds, nomenclature rules (IUPAC), isomerism types, reaction mechanisms, and purification/analysis techniques.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze structural representations and shapes of organic compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "C9",
      "title": "Hydrocarbon Classification and Properties",
      "description": "Enable learners to classify hydrocarbons, understand properties of alkanes, alkenes, alkynes, aromatic compounds, and assess carcinogenicity/toxicity.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify different types of hydrocarbons"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    },
    {
      "code": "C10",
      "title": "Solutions and Colligative Properties",
      "description": "Enable learners to express concentration, understand solubility principles (ideal/non-ideal), apply colligative properties for molar mass determination.",
      "competencies": [
        "Express concentration of solutions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Solutions",
      "chapter_name": "Solutions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C11",
      "title": "Electrochemistry and Energy Conversion",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand electrochemical cells, galvanic cells, Nernst equation applications, conductance, electrolytic processes, batteries, fuel cells, and corrosion mechanisms.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze Galvanic Cells and Electrolytic Cells"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Electrochemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Electrochemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12",
      "title": "Chemical Kinetics and Reaction Rates",
      "description": "Enable learners to analyze factors influencing reaction rates, apply integrated rate equations, understand temperature dependence (Arrhenius), and collision theory.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze factors influencing rate of chemical reactions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemical Kinetics",
      "chapter_name": "Chemical Kinetics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C13",
      "title": "d- and f-Block Elements Chemistry",
      "description": "Enable learners to correlate position in periodic table with electronic configuration, analyze general properties of transition elements (d-block), lanthanoids, actinoids, and their applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Correlate electronic configuration with d/f block positions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "d-and f-Block Elements",
      "chapter_name": "d -and f -Block Elements"
    },
    {
      "code": "C14",
      "title": "Coordination Compounds and Bonding",
      "description": "Enable learners to apply Werner's theory, understand nomenclature rules, analyze isomerism types, explain bonding in coordination compounds (including metal carbonyls), and identify applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Werner's Theory of Coordination Compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Coordination Compounds",
      "chapter_name": "Coordination Compounds"
    },
    {
      "code": "C15",
      "title": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes Reactivity",
      "description": "Enable learners to classify, name (nomenclature), understand C-X bond nature, methods of preparation, physical properties, chemical reactions, and polyhalogen compounds.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze classification and nomenclature of haloalkanes/haloarenes"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes",
      "chapter_name": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes"
    },
    {
      "code": "C16",
      "title": "Alcohols, Phenols, Ethers Chemistry",
      "description": "Enable learners to classify compounds, understand functional group structures (alcoholic/phenolic), nomenclature, and properties of commercially important alcohols.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify Alcohols, Phenols, and Ethers"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers",
      "chapter_name": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers"
    },
    {
      "code": "C17",
      "title": "Carbonyl Compounds Chemistry",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand nomenclature/structure of carbonyl groups (aldehydes/ketones) and carboxyl groups, methods of preparation, physical properties, chemical reactions, and uses.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze structure and reactivity of Aldehydes/Ketones"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids",
      "chapter_name": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids"
    },
    {
      "code": "C18",
      "title": "Amines Chemistry",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand structure/classification/nomenclature of amines, preparation methods (including Diazonium salts), physical properties, and chemical reactions in synthesis.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze classification and nomenclature of Amines"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Amines",
      "chapter_name": "Amines"
    },
    {
      "code": "C19",
      "title": "Biomolecules Structure and Function",
      "description": "Enable learners to identify structures of carbohydrates, proteins (enzymes), vitamins, nucleic acids, hormones, and understand their biological roles.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify major classes of biomolecules"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Biomolecules",
      "chapter_name": "Biomolecules"
    },
    {
      "code": "C20",
      "title": "Surface Chemistry and Colloids",
      "description": "Enable learners to distinguish between true solutions, colloids, suspensions; understand physisorption/chemisorption factors, lyophilic/lyophobic properties, coagulation, emulsions.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish types of sols (Lyophilic/Lyophobic)"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Surface Chemistry",
      "chapter_name": "Surface Chemistry"
    },
    {
      "code": "C21",
      "title": "Isolation and Extraction Principles",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand principles of extraction (concentration, oxidation, reduction), electrolytic methods, refining processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze general principles of isolation"
      ],
      "unit_name": "General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Elements",
      "chapter_name": "General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Elements"
    },
    {
      "code": "C22",
      "title": "Polymers Chemistry",
      "description": "Enable learners to understand polymerisation processes, distinguish between homopolymers and copolymers.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify polymers as Homopolymers or Copolymers"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Polymers",
      "chapter_name": "Polymers"
    },
    {
      "code": "C23",
      "title": "Chemistry in Everyday Life",
      "description": "Enable learners to identify chemicals used in medicines (analgesics, antibiotics, etc.) and food preservatives/sweeteners/antioxidants.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify applications of chemistry in daily life"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Chemistry in Everyday Life",
      "chapter_name": "Chemistry in Everyday Life"
    },
    {
      "code": "C24",
      "title": "Laboratory Skills and Safety",
      "description": "Enable learners to perform basic laboratory techniques (cutting, bending glass), characterization/purification methods (melting/boiling point determination, crystallization), pH analysis, volumetric titrations, salt analysis, and qualitative organic tests.",
      "competencies": [
        "Perform micro-chemical methods safely"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Basic Laboratory Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances"
    },
    {
      "code": "C25",
      "title": "Scientific Inquiry and Project Work",
      "description": "Enable learners to design scientific investigations, conduct laboratory testing, collect data from various sources (e.g., water contamination analysis, food adulteration studies), and analyze results.",
      "competencies": [
        "Design and execute investigatory projects"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Project Work",
      "chapter_name": "Scientific Investigations"
    }
  ]
}
